title: dicerocaryum eriocarpum
intro: Dicerocaryum eriocarpum is a species of flowering plant in the family Pedaliaceae, commonly known as the stilt root or stilt root plant. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Dicerocaryum eriocarpum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used as a supplement or added to food products, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
